basic_details.job_title: MGU Senior Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Senior Software Developer Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MGU Senior Software Developer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 23 years Maximum Age: 45 years Relaxation to SC/ST/OBC Candidates as per rules. A relaxation of 1 year in age for every 1 year of service, up to a maximum of 5 years, will be given to candidates for experience in Universities.

qualification.details: Bachelors/Masters degree in Information Technology or Computer Science or Computer Applications BE in Computer Science or IT BTech in Computer Science or IT Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Application Knowledge of PHP web frameworks including Yii/Laravel/CodeIgniter Knowledge of front-end technologies including CSS3, JavaScript, and HTML5 Understanding of object-oriented PHP programming Familiarity with MySQL/Maria DB/ MSSQL Technology certification if any will be an added advantage Worked with Docker, virtualization, containerization - will be considered as added advantage

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the MGU Senior Software Developer post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Software Developer position at Mahatma Gandhi University is scheduled for 19th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Software Developer role at MGU?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelors/Masters degree in Information Technology or Computer Science or Computer Applications, or equivalent BE/BTech degrees. A Diploma in Computer Science/Application is also accepted. Specific knowledge of PHP frameworks and front-end technologies is essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Software Developer post is between 23 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per university rules and government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Software Developer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Software Developer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Software Developer post?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi University has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Software Developer position through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the MGU Senior Software Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Senior Software Developer post. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Software Developer role at MGU?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Software Developer post will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Machine Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the MGU Senior Software Developer walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for experienced candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, a relaxation of 1 year in age for every 1 year of service, up to a maximum of 5 years, will be given to candidates with experience in Universities. This is in addition to the general age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Senior Software Developer position?
faq.answer: The Senior Software Developer position at Mahatma Gandhi University is a contract-based job. The duration of the contract will be as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.
